  "text": "Filing # 241394791 E-Filed 02/10/2026 11:36:31 AM

IN THE CIRCUIT COURT OF THE 18TH
JUDICIAL CIRCUIT, IN AND FOR
SEMINOLE COUNTY, FLORIDA

CASE NO.: 2020-CA-000661

U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, NOT
IN ITS INDIVIDUAL CAPACITY BUT
SOLELY AS TRUSTEE FOR THE RMAC
TRUST, SERIES 2016-CTT,

Plaintiff,
v.

TRSTE, LLC AS TRUSTEE OF THE
SEMINOLE COUNTY SUMMIT RIDGE 404
106 LAND TRUST; et al,

Defendant(s).
/

ORDER APPROVING STIPULATION FOR SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL

This cause came before the Court without a hearing, on the Stipulation for Substitution of
Counsel, filed on January 13, 2026 [Docket No. 158]. The Court read the Stipulation and finds
that it complies with Fla. R. Gen. Prac. Jud. Admin. 2.505(e)(3). Accordingly, it is hereby

ORDERED AND ADJUDGED that:

1. The Stipulation is APPROVED

2. Attorney Anya E. Macias of GHIDOTTI | BERGER LLP is substituted as counsel of

record for Plaintiff in place of Diaz Anselmo & Associates P.A.

3. Diaz Anselmo & Associates P.A. and its Attorneys are relieved from further

representation of the Plaintiff in this case.

DONE AND ORDERED in Chambers in Sanford, Seminole County, Florida on this
Tuesday, February 10, 2026.

59-2020-CA-000661 02/10/2026 11:35:50 AM

Donna Goerner, Circuit Judge

59-2020-CA-000661 02/10/2026 11:35:50 AM
